meaning: n.作记号的人,记分员,纪念碑,标记,里程碑n.[军]标兵
examples: He placed a marker where the ball had landed.
Price is not always an accurate marker of quality.
However, he suggests highlighting the presence of a genetic marker may help doctors diagnose the condition.
He jumped in front of the 385-foot marker and caught the ball above the fence.
